tspoken.
If Jupiter occupies Aries/Scorpio and is aspected by Venus, one will be very happy in respect of
residences, sleeping comforts, robes, scents, garlands, ornaments and wife and be very
timid.
If Jupiter occupies Aries/Scorpio and is aspected by Saturn, the subject will be dirty, miserly,
sharp, adventurous, amiable, famous and will not have lasting children and friendship.
31-36. JUPITER IN TAURUS/LIBRA IN ASPECT TO OTHERS. If Jupiter occupies a House of
Venus at birth and is aspected by the Sun, one will be endowed with attendants and
quadrupeds. will wander verily, will have a long body, be learned and be a kings minister.
If Jupiter occupies a House of Venus and is aspected by the Moon, the native will be abundantly
rich, be very calm, Sweet, be dear to mother and wife and will enjoy much pleasures.
If Jupiter occupies a House of Venus and is aspected by Mars, the native will be dear to the fair
sex, be learned, courageous, affluent, happy and be of royal Scion.
